$comment: Repo-level MCP server configuration. Read by Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP-aware clients. Mirrored to .vscode/mcp.json for VS Code Copilot and to .cursor/mcp.json for Cursor.

codegraph.$comment: CodeGraph — semantic code intelligence: symbol lookup, callers/callees, route mapping. The server discovers the project via CWD (Claude Code and other clients launch MCP servers from the project root). VS Code Copilot uses .vscode/mcp.json instead, which expands ${workspaceFolder}. Requires 'codegraph init' inside the project to build the index (scaffold.sh runs this automatically). See docs/guides/MCP_SETUP.md.
